name: Hudl Sports Video Analysis API
what_it_does: Hudl Sports Performance REST API for sports video analysis, performance data, and athlete development. Enables AI agents to manage video upload and tagging for sports film review automation, handle play annotation and breakdown for coaching workflow, access athlete performance metrics and tracking data for performance analytics, retrieve highlight creation and sharing for sports recruiting workflow, manage team and roster management for sports organization data, handle recruiting profile and evaluation for athlete recruitment, access game data and statistics integration for sports analytics, retrieve scouting report and opponent analysis data for competitive intelligence, manage Hudl Sportscode integration for elite video analysis workflow, and integrate Hudl performance data with strength and conditioning, sports science, and recruiting platforms.
use_cases: Analyzing game film from coaching analysis agents
Creating recruiting highlights from sports recruiting agents
Tracking athlete performance from sports science agents
Scouting opponents from competitive intelligence agents
not_for: Non-team sports without video analysis workflow
Professional sports without proper data licensing
Consumer fitness apps without team sports context
best_when: A sports organization, college athletics program, or professional sports team using Hudl wants AI agents to automate video analysis, performance data processing, recruiting workflow, and coaching film review.
avoid_when: FERPA/COPPA RISK: Hudl is used by high school athletic programs — student-athlete video and performance data is protected under FERPA; automated sharing of minor athlete data requires school/parent consent. NCAA recruiting compliance — automated recruiting video sharing and communication with prospective student-athletes must comply with NCAA recruiting calendar and contact restrictions; automated out-of-period contact creates NCAA rules violation. Biometric data — advanced tracking data (GPS, heart rate, motion capture) may constitute biometric data subject to BIPA in Illinois and CCPA biometric data provisions; automated processing requires consent.

auth.notes: Hudl uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.hudl.com. Webhooks for video and event data. REST API with JSON. Lincoln, Nebraska HQ. Founded 2006 by David Graff. Private (Vista Equity Partners, Accel). $2.5B+ valuation. 4M+ athletes and coaches globally. 200,000+ teams. Market leader in sports video analysis. Competes with XOS Technologies and Catapult for sports video and analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — team subscription pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-team or per-sport annual subscription; enterprise college/pro pricing
pricing.notes: Lincoln, NE. Founded 2006. Vista Equity/Accel-backed. $2.5B+ valuation. 4M+ athletes/coaches. 200K+ teams. Sports video analysis market leader. Competes with XOS and Catapult.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA STUDENT ATHLETE DATA: High school programs use Hudl for student-athlete film; FERPA protects student education records including athletic performance; automated sharing of minor student-athlete data requires school and parent consent

NCAA recruiting compliance — automated prospective student-athlete video sharing and communication must comply with NCAA recruiting calendar; automated out-of-period contact creates NCAA rules violation and eligibility risk

Minor athlete biometric data — GPS and motion capture tracking of minor athletes may constitute biometric data under BIPA (Illinois) and CCPA; automated processing requires parental consent for minors
Video storage costs — Hudl video uploads can be large (HD game film); automated large-volume video upload must account for storage tier limits and associated costs
Opponent film distribution — automated sharing of opponent game film requires understanding of data sharing permissions; unauthorized distribution of opponent film may violate Hudl terms of service
Sportscode integration — Hudl's professional/elite product Sportscode has different API architecture; verify which Hudl product your target organization uses before integration planning
agent_readiness.security_notes: Sports video analysis. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Athlete performance and video data. Minor athlete data sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Sports video analysis. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Athlete performance data. FERPA sensitivity.
